lanes.title: e2e-ui/full/polished_beta_staging_verify.spec.ts › Polished beta deployed staging verification › Lane F - Numbered pagination reaches first second and last pages @staging_verify
lanes.correction_reason: Both reruns failed in auth.setup.ts:154 (login timeout, 220s) before the Lane F pagination test was reached. Lane F status was 'skipped' in both rerun reporter JSONs. The driver's is_auth_budget_setup_failure only matches HTTP 429 patterns and missed this non-429 timeout mode.
